rag_rules: Preserve the AADL architecture by inserting AGREE annex blocks only in valid component or implementation scopes
Place component type annexes in the component type scope and implementation annexes in the implementation scope after subcomponents and connections
Use only visible identifiers from the current scope or the AADL model structure
Do not insert clauses that reference AADL properties directly as AGREE variables
generic_rules: Maintain the original AADL model structure during fusion
Ensure inserted annex blocks are syntactically valid AGREE
Preserve existing subcomponents and connections when inserting implementation-level bindings
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Component type annexes should contain assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
Implementation annexes should contain implementation-level bindings such as assignments
anti_patterns: Do not insert clauses that compare opaque Boolean data without explicit numeric representation
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without model-provided variables
Do not use event ports in numeric or Boolean comparisons without explicit data values
